personal.preferred_title: Senior AWS Data Engineer | Cloud/ETL Specialist

summary: Senior AWS Data Engineer with extensive experience in Python, SQL, PySpark, and ETL/ELT pipeline development. Skilled in cloud automation, API integrations, and AI-assisted data workflows, with hands-on experience in AWS Glue, Lambda, Step Functions, S3, and Amazon Textract.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Built large-scale Python/PySpark ETL pipelines ingesting telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints into AWS S3/Glue/Redshift.
Developed event-driven and batch data workflows leveraging AWS Lambda and Step Functions for orchestration.
Implemented GenAI Text-to-SQL agents and automated pipeline orchestration to ensure data quality and reliability.
Designed dashboards and reporting pipelines using Streamlit, matplotlib, and plotly for operational and executive insights.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Python-based telemetry pipelines with API integrations and real-time data processing.
Performed ETL validation, automated testing, and monitoring for production-grade data workflows.
Collaborated with engineering and analytics teams to optimize pipeline performance and data quality.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering
Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science

skills.Languages: Python, SQL, Perl, Ksh / Korn Shell Scripting
skills.Cloud & Data: AWS (Glue, Lambda, Step Functions, S3, Redshift, Textract), PySpark, ETL/ELT pipelines, Data Modeling, Data Warehousing
skills.Big Data: Event-driven pipelines, batch processing, streaming pipelines, PySpark
skills.Orchestration & Tools: Airflow, Git/GitHub Actions, CI/CD pipelines, FastAPI, Docker
skills.Monitoring / Observability: Dynatrace, CA APM, AppDynamics, data validation frameworks
skills.AI/ML: GenAI / LLM pipelines, Text-to-SQL automation, Python AI-assisted pipelines
skills.Visualization & Reporting: Streamlit, matplotlib, seaborn, plotly dashboards, Power BI concepts

projects.name: AWS Cloud Data Pipeline & API Integration
projects.description: Designed and implemented ETL pipelines, API connectors, and event-driven workflows using AWS Glue, Lambda, Step Functions, and Amazon Textract. Automated monitoring and validation for AI-powered analytics and ERP integration pipelines.
